title: Tithymalus × jablonskianus
intro: Tithymalus × jablonskianus, commonly known as the Euphorbia jablonskiana hybrid, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Tithymalus × jablonskianus include flavonoids, terpenoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat skin irritations, wounds, and other topical conditions.
